violations.text: Food items were observed stored on the floor in the freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2025

The dry food storage closet in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue, and rodent dropping. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment must clean and sanitize any and all droppings. Establishment must use appropriate means of cleaning and sanitizing. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control to eliminate pests from premises. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The condensate from the walk in refrigeration unit is draining on the floor in the storage closet. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
The floor in the walk in cooler area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025

The floor in the storage closet has an accumulation of soil residue, pest droppings and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control to eliminate rodent activity. Establishment is to clean and sanitize any and all droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024

The floors in the storage area has an accumulation of soil residue, rodent droppings and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Corrective Action - Establishment must continue to work with pest control, establishment must check for droppings, and clean any and all droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2024
